matrix.capability: Token cost for deterministic Wave A pipeline (10k anúncios/mês × 7 steps)
matrix.langgraph-day1: $70/mês platform fees + $39+/mês LangSmith + LLM tokens if any node calls an LLM

matrix.cron-supabase: 1 SQL function + 1 Edge Function per pipeline step (already in stack)
matrix.langgraph-day1: Graph definition, checkpointer, state schema, deployment, observability layer — new abstraction tier

matrix.cron-supabase: SQL queries against cron.job_run_details + Supabase Logs
matrix.langgraph-day1: Time-travel via LangSmith — richer for LLM, overkill for ETL
matrix.advantage: cron-supabase for deterministic; LangGraph wins ONLY when LLM/non-determinism involved

matrix.cron-supabase: 100% native — cron job_run_details, Edge logs, Insights
matrix.langgraph-day1: LangSmith is external service requiring integration
NOT enforced by framework — by design, supports non-determinism

matrix.cron-supabase: BYO via execution IDs + status table (community pattern)
matrix.langgraph-day1: Built-in checkpointer durability between nodes (though not inside long-running nodes)

matrix.capability: Fit for volume Zona Sul (1k-10k anúncios/mês)
matrix.cron-supabase: Comfortable — pg_cron handles thousands of jobs/min
matrix.langgraph-day1: Comfortable — but priced per node execution, so cost scales linearly

matrix.capability: Evolution path to Wave B (NLP classifier + message generator)
matrix.cron-supabase: Easy hand-off: pg_cron triggers Edge Function that delegates ONLY the NLP step to a LangGraph subgraph
matrix.evidence: AppFolio Realm-X precedent uses exactly this hybrid pattern

matrix.cron-supabase: Generic Supabase usage across thousands of apps

matrix.langgraph-day1: Checkpointer between nodes; long node still has gap
